source_notes: Source: English Devolution White Paper (Dec 2024) for LGR-pending list.
Source: Local Government Boundary Commission for England — current cycle pattern by council.
Welsh principal areas: Local Government and Elections (Wales) Act 2021, s. 7 — 5-year cycle.
All dates assume the first Thursday in May per established convention; subject to Statutory Instruments.
metadata.review: Hand-audit before quoting publicly. LGR timetable is moving; flip lgr_pending → scheduled as each SI lands.

adur.cycle: District tier under LGR review. Council may be abolished into a new unitary.
adur.note: Two-tier council under English Local Government Reorganisation. Next election date awaiting Statutory Instrument.
